candidate.completion: put me on hold with customer service so i can hear a human voice.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me on hold with customer service so i can hear a human voice.

evaluation.rationale: A clear and plausible turn: loneliness gets rerouted into the degraded substitute of customer-service contact. The idea is fresh enough and humanly legible, but the sentence is long, a bit prose-shaped, and the pivot lacks the snap and inevitability of stronger wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
